html:
Exclusive to:  

The Cargo Boat is a craftable Boat in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab, requires 6 Boards and 3 Ropes to craft, and an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype. Along with being customizable with boat attachments such as Sails, it allows the player an extra 6 slots of storage.

The Cargo Boat begins with 300 durability, which will deplete as it takes damage from going against Waves. While moving, it will also lose durability over time at a rate of 1 per 4.8 seconds, lasting a total of 3 Days. Cargo Boats can be repaired with a Boat Repair Kit or the Sea Yard.

Tips

  • A Set Piece can be found with a lone Cargo Boat that contains a Spear Gun, a Spear and 3 Morsels, but if the player gets on the boat, 3 Sea Hounds will spawn and attack the player. Depending on when the player has found the boat, the Morsels may spoil and become Rot.

Gallery

  • A Cargo Boat with a Trawl Net attached.
  • A Cargo Boat at night with a Boat Torch attached.
  • A glitched Cargo Boat sailing on land. This bug can no longer occur.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

The Cargo Boat begins with 300 durability, which will deplete as it takes damage from going against Waves. While moving, it will also lose durability over time at a rate of 1 per 4.8 seconds, lasting a total of 3 Days. Cargo Boats can be repaired with a Boat Repair Kit or the Sea Yard.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thuyền Chở Hàng là Thuyền chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng hải, yêu cầu 6 Ván ép và 3 Dây thừng để chế tạo và Máy luyện kim hoặc Phòng thí nghiệm Biển để tạo nguyên mẫu. Cùng với việc có thể tùy chỉnh với các phụ kiện gắn trên thuyền như Cánh buồm, nó còn cho phép người chơi có thêm 6 khe chứa đồ.

The '''Cargo Boat''' is a craftable [[Boats|Boat]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Nautical Tab]], requires 6 [[Boards]] and 3 [[Rope]]s to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] or [[Sea Lab]] to prototype. Along with being customizable with boat attachments such as [[Sail]]s, it allows the player an extra 6 slots of storage.

The Cargo Boat begins with 300 durability, which will deplete as it takes damage from going against [[Waves]]. While moving, it will also lose durability over time at a rate of 1 per 4.8 seconds, lasting a total of 3 [[Day]]s. Cargo Boats can be repaired with a [[Boat Repair Kit]] or the [[Sea Yard]].

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* A [[Set Piece]] can be found with a lone Cargo Boat that contains a [[Spear Gun]], a [[Spear]] and 3 [[Morsel]]s, but if the player gets on the boat, 3 [[Sea Hounds]] will spawn and attack the player. Depending on when the player has found the boat, the Morsels may spoil and become [[Rot]].
